headline: What's Next in Destination Weddings: Spring 2026 Trends from Mexico & the Caribbean
summary: From state‑of‑the‑art Kosher kitchens in Mexico City to South Asian wedding expertise in Cancun—and breathtaking beachfront celebrations across the Caribbean—Marriott transforms today's wedding trends into unforgettable realities for modern couples.

headline: Best Western Plus Pepper Tree Inn Santa Barbara Converts to Marriott Lifestyle Brand
summary: Hawkins Way Capital and FOUND Hotels announced that Best Western Plus Pepper Tree Inn, a long-standing Santa Barbara favorite for travelers, has now upgraded and rebranded to become FOUND Hotels, Santa Barbara,Series by Marriott, bringing Marriott Bonvoy® rewards, complimentary breakfast, free parking, and enhanced guest services to one of the city's most recognized hospitality landmarks.
